Brand_A_Distance.description: Distances (in yards) for Brand A golf balls hit by Iron Byron. One of four brand groups compared in the one-way ANOVA; shares the same sample structure as Brand B, C, and D distances (different brand grouping of golf ball hits).

Brand_B_Distance.description: Distances (in yards) for Brand B golf balls hit by Iron Byron. One of four brand groups compared in the one-way ANOVA; shares the same sample structure as Brand A, C, and D distances (different brand grouping of golf ball hits).

Brand_C_Distance.description: Distances (in yards) for Brand C golf balls hit by Iron Byron. One of four brand groups compared in the one-way ANOVA; shares the same sample structure as Brand A, B, and D distances (different brand grouping of golf ball hits).

Brand_D_Distance.description: Distances (in yards) for Brand D golf balls hit by Iron Byron. One of four brand groups compared in the one-way ANOVA; shares the same sample structure as Brand A, B, and C distances (different brand grouping of golf ball hits).
